title: Course Listing Unavailable

jokes.text: if you're watching this, it means I'm dead. Or I'm just showing you. Uh, but I'm probably dead.
jokes.setup: Dramatic video will setup - 'if you're watching this, I'm dead'
jokes.punchline: Casual backtrack and return to original assumption
jokes.explanation: Good subversion of dramatic video will trope with casual uncertainty

jokes.text: To my ex-wife Magda, I leave herpes. But she knows that, it's dealt with.
jokes.punchline: Casual mention of STD as inheritance with matter-of-fact follow-up
jokes.explanation: Dark humor perfectly integrated with character's scuzzy nature

jokes.text: As for my collection of Styx albums, I leave that to no one. Because that's who appreciated Styx as much as me.
jokes.punchline: Logical conclusion that no one else likes Styx
jokes.explanation: Solid character-specific joke about musical taste

jokes.text: How one-armed was he? Tell me when to stop.
jokes.punchline: Physical demonstration of arm positions
jokes.explanation: Perfect Troy logic - literal interpretation of 'one-armed' with physical comedy

jokes.text: It was the other arm.
jokes.punchline: Continuation of the literal demonstration
jokes.explanation: Excellent economy - three words that perfectly cap the bit

jokes.text: Star-Burns died how he lived... in a meth lab explosion
jokes.setup: Traditional obituary format 'died how he lived'
jokes.punchline: Meth lab explosion as lifestyle
jokes.explanation: Good subversion of obituary cliche with dark humor

jokes.text: He's in a better place now. - Yeah. The blu-ray shelf.
jokes.punchline: Literal location of his ashes on shelf
jokes.explanation: Perfect setup/punchline with Abed's literal interpretation of spiritual comfort

jokes.text: I don't think he knows how ashes work.
jokes.setup: Star-Burns' request to burn his ashes
jokes.punchline: Logical observation about impossibility
jokes.explanation: Classic Abed deadpan logic about the physical impossibility

jokes.text: If we rub that, will he come out and do celebrity impressions?
jokes.setup: Looking at small urn containing lizard
jokes.punchline: Confusion with genie lamp trope
jokes.explanation: Typical Pierce confusion mixing up cultural references

jokes.text: Is it always about the Holocaust with you people?
jokes.punchline: Pierce's inappropriate assumption and phrasing
jokes.explanation: Classic Pierce inappropriate comment, relies on character's established bigotry

jokes.text: by the time I finish this sentence, 100 people will have died in China. Why did you stop talking?
jokes.punchline: Confusion when others react to morbid statement
jokes.explanation: Chang's oblivious insensitivity creates awkward moment

jokes.text: I have to call my pen pal.
jokes.punchline: Random excuse to leave uncomfortable situation
jokes.explanation: Good character beat - Chang fleeing his own awkwardness

jokes.text: He barely sued me that time I ran over his foot.
jokes.punchline: Evidence is restraint in lawsuit over injury Pierce caused
jokes.explanation: Perfect Pierce logic - measuring someone's character by litigation restraint

jokes.text: I say we honor Star-Burns by discussing him the same amount we did when he was alive.
jokes.punchline: Implication they never talked about him
jokes.explanation: Sharp observation about how little they cared about classmate while alive

jokes.text: Pai Mai? It's Troy. Are you okay? Okay, good, I gotta go. This costs $7.
jokes.punchline: Literal phone call to check on pen pal with cost concern
jokes.explanation: Brilliant Troy moment - literal response to Chang's statistics with genuine concern and practical considerations

jokes.text: As a psychologist... Student. I hereby offer my licensed... Unlicensed. Services as a grief counselor. Grief causer.
jokes.punchline: Systematic correction of every false credential
jokes.explanation: Great escalation of corrections ending with 'grief causer' - perfect rhythm

jokes.text: the doctor... Not even close. Is in.
jokes.punchline: Final devastating correction
jokes.explanation: Good cap to the correction sequence

jokes.text: You seemed smarter than me when I met you.
jokes.punchline: Britta's insecure response to compliment
jokes.explanation: Typical Britta self-deprecation in response to praise

jokes.text: What's heaven like? Uh, I don't know. Glittery.
jokes.setup: Britta pretending to be dead Star-Burns
jokes.punchline: Completely unprepared answer about afterlife
jokes.explanation: Britta's improvised theology - vague and inadequate

jokes.text: Have you seen Tim Russert?
jokes.punchline: Specific question about deceased news anchor
jokes.explanation: Perfect Troy question - innocent curiosity about specific person

jokes.text: why did you smell exactly like salami?
jokes.punchline: Specific and unsavory personal detail
jokes.explanation: Good character detail about Star-Burns' hygiene

jokes.text: Where's my comb? I don't know. Yep, it's him.
jokes.setup: Pierce asking Star-Burns about missing comb
jokes.punchline: Britta's ignorance confirms Star-Burns' identity
jokes.explanation: Clever logic - not knowing personal details proves authenticity

jokes.text: Why did you always poop with the stall door open?
jokes.punchline: Extremely inappropriate bathroom behavior
jokes.explanation: Gross-out humor that fits Star-Burns character

jokes.text: Is it true you made out with Britta? I don't see how that's relevant.
jokes.punchline: Britta's defensive non-denial
jokes.explanation: Standard awkward reveal with defensive response

jokes.text: maybe it was because she was really drunk and she had just found out that her first boyfriend was getting married.
jokes.setup: Denial of making out with Star-Burns
jokes.punchline: Detailed explanation that confirms it happened
jokes.explanation: Classic Britta overshare that contradicts her denial

jokes.text: Ow! Okay, grief counseling is growing on me.
jokes.punchline: Jeff enjoying her pain
jokes.explanation: Jeff's sadistic pleasure at Britta's discomfort is perfectly in character

jokes.text: Come on, I'm Dean and my hands are so clean at this moment I am stapling
jokes.punchline: Rhyming song about mundane office task
jokes.explanation: Typical Dean musical moment with forced rhyming

jokes.text: Ben, how's it 'deaning'? Can't 'com-Chang.'
jokes.punchline: Chang's name pun response
jokes.explanation: Routine pun exchange between these characters

jokes.text: Indefinite detention, pepper spray, involuntary cavity searches... no soft-serve?
jokes.punchline: Treating ice cream ban as equally concerning
jokes.explanation: Great escalation with perfect misdirection on what the Dean finds most concerning

jokes.text: Well, I'll tell you how the sausage gets made. It's a lot of ground meat and it gets stuffed into a casing that looks like a cross between a dude's dong and a poop.
jokes.setup: Metaphor about not wanting to know how things work
jokes.punchline: Literal, graphic description of actual sausage making
jokes.explanation: Perfect Chang moment - taking metaphor literally with crude description

jokes.text: I don't know how that helps me, but please leave.
jokes.punchline: Dean's confused dismissal
jokes.explanation: Good straight-man response to Chang's absurdity

jokes.text: And now... he's catching fire too.
jokes.setup: Grief exercise about puppy in basket
jokes.punchline: Adding more trauma to visualization
jokes.explanation: Britta making her grief exercise unnecessarily traumatic

jokes.text: Britta! Why are you making us feel these things?
jokes.punchline: Troy's emotional protest
jokes.explanation: Troy's innocent distress at Britta's therapy methods

jokes.text: Name any other stage. What are you, my final?
jokes.setup: Annie challenging Jeff about grief stages
jokes.punchline: Jeff treating it like a test he doesn't want to take
jokes.explanation: Good Jeff deflection - avoiding emotional engagement through sarcasm

jokes.text: What are you, my final?
jokes.punchline: Britta deflecting like it's a test question
jokes.explanation: Good Britta deflection, reveals she doesn't actually know

jokes.text: I can do it. Whatever.
jokes.punchline: Fake reluctant attitude about performing
jokes.explanation: Annie's transparent eagerness disguised as reluctance

jokes.text: Dean-jour, mes amis!
jokes.punchline: French greeting with Dean pun
jokes.explanation: Typical Dean wordplay with his name

jokes.text: and you biology class has been can-can-cancelled.
jokes.setup: Delivering bad news about cancelled class
jokes.punchline: French can-can reference with leg kicks
jokes.explanation: Dean's inappropriate musical delivery of serious news

jokes.text: Well, I had a little rockette kick-line thing planned, but...
jokes.setup: Annie's screaming reaction to summer school
jokes.punchline: Dean's planned dance routine disrupted
jokes.explanation: Dean's tone-deaf preparation for delivering bad news

jokes.text: Ave Maria! No, thank you.
jokes.punchline: Shirley declining to perform after that
jokes.explanation: Good reaction to awful performance

jokes.text: Because his sideburns were shaped like stars. I just got it. I just got that.
jokes.punchline: Pierce finally understanding obvious nickname
jokes.explanation: Classic Pierce moment - slow to understand obvious things

jokes.text: Whoo! Closure!
jokes.setup: Jeff claiming to have reached acceptance stage
jokes.punchline: Premature celebration of emotional progress
jokes.explanation: Jeff's fake enthusiasm about grief processing

jokes.text: This fallujah of higher learning... is a prison from which none of us will ever escape.
jokes.punchline: Extremely negative metaphors for the school
jokes.explanation: Jeff's dark speech disguised as acceptance - mixing war and prison metaphors

jokes.text: was a hero to us the whole time because he did the one thing that none of us ever tried to do. He got out. And then he exploded.
jokes.setup: Star-Burns as hero for escaping school
jokes.punchline: Death as ultimate escape method
jokes.explanation: Brilliant dark comedy - reframing death as successful escape with casual delivery

jokes.text: forces their desiccated husks to attend summer school.
jokes.punchline: Graphic imagery of dried-out corpses in summer school
jokes.explanation: Vivid, disturbing metaphor for academic punishment

jokes.text: Let's keep it light.
jokes.punchline: Dean's inappropriate request for lighter tone
jokes.explanation: Dean's oblivious attempt at crowd control after devastating speech

jokes.text: Get some sugar to go with that spice.
jokes.setup: Trying to lighten mood after Jeff's speech
jokes.punchline: Cooking metaphor for balancing harsh words
jokes.explanation: Weak Dean attempt at lightening the mood with forced metaphor

jokes.text: Greendale has warped me like a Barbie in a microwave.
jokes.setup: Annie's speech about what Greendale has done to her
jokes.punchline: Vivid metaphor of plastic toy destruction
jokes.explanation: Brilliant and disturbing metaphor that perfectly captures Annie's transformation - highly quotable

jokes.text: Our school flag is an anus!
jokes.punchline: Embarrassing detail about school symbol
jokes.explanation: Direct and embarrassing truth about the school

jokes.text: You were the guys who drew it.
jokes.punchline: Dean pointing out their involvement in creating it
jokes.explanation: Good callback pointing out their hypocrisy

jokes.text: And the cherry on top on this total lack of sundae...
jokes.punchline: Subverting 'cherry on top of sundae' phrase
jokes.explanation: Clever wordplay inverting the sundae metaphor

jokes.text: Edison out.
jokes.punchline: Cool mic-drop exit line with last name
jokes.explanation: Perfect Annie moment - angry but still trying to be cool with formal exit

jokes.text: Let's maybe not drop the $50 mics, okay, guys?
jokes.punchline: Dean's practical concern about equipment cost
jokes.explanation: Perfect Dean reaction - administrative concerns over dramatic moments

jokes.text: And sold them to Subway.
jokes.setup: Shirley's speech about stolen sandwich shop dreams
jokes.punchline: Corporate takeover of her entrepreneurial dreams
jokes.explanation: Good callback to Shirley's business aspirations

jokes.text: Worst wake ever.
jokes.punchline: Chang's blunt assessment of the event
jokes.explanation: Simple but effective commentary on the disaster

jokes.text: Yep. Every type we got.
jokes.setup: Dean asking Chang to use restraint
jokes.punchline: Chang interpreting 'restraint' as types of physical restraints
jokes.explanation: Clever wordplay showing Chang's authoritarian mindset

jokes.text: All hail Chang!
jokes.setup: Chang taking control with child security force
jokes.punchline: Military-style worship of Chang
jokes.explanation: Shows Chang's dictatorial control over child army

jokes.text: Let's burn this mother down! Helter skelter!
jokes.setup: Leonard given chance to speak at funeral
jokes.punchline: Immediately inciting riot with Charles Manson reference
jokes.explanation: Perfect Leonard moment - immediately escalating to violence and chaos

jokes.text: I'm gonna take everything but onions and olives.
jokes.punchline: Student's specific food preferences during looting
jokes.explanation: Good absurd detail - maintaining food preferences during chaos

jokes.text: I know my comb's in here, you son of a bitch!
jokes.punchline: Still obsessed with missing comb during riot
jokes.explanation: Good callback showing Pierce's priorities during chaos

jokes.text: Look, tiny riot gear. Aww.
jokes.setup: Chang's child security force in action
jokes.punchline: Troy finding child-sized equipment adorable
jokes.explanation: Perfect Troy moment - finding something cute in the middle of violence

jokes.text: It's not like I'm crying because I was chased by the gang of scary 12-year-olds.
jokes.setup: Jeff being searched for pepper spray
jokes.punchline: Defensive denial about being intimidated by children
jokes.explanation: Jeff's wounded pride at being defeated by children

jokes.text: Catchy.
jokes.punchline: Chang's casual approval of the nickname
jokes.explanation: Chang's nonchalant response to serious situation

jokes.text: How about Pierce Hawthorne and the Greendale Six?
jokes.punchline: Pierce trying to make himself the leader
jokes.explanation: Classic Pierce self-aggrandizement

jokes.text: How about the Greendale Five?
jokes.punchline: Pierce lowering the number to exclude people
jokes.explanation: Pierce's petty response to rejection

jokes.text: we trashed the school like a TV commercial where the teacher banned skittles.
jokes.punchline: Specific and absurd commercial comparison
jokes.explanation: Brilliant specific metaphor for their overreaction

jokes.text: we're all Ted Danson at Whoopie Goldberg's roast.
jokes.punchline: Reference to infamous awkward roast moment
jokes.explanation: Specific pop culture reference to famous awkward moment

jokes.text: Here we go... oop, you're walking away from the hug.
jokes.punchline: Others rejecting his physical affection
jokes.explanation: Pierce's sad acknowledgment of rejection

jokes.text: Got some testimony to get prepared for the school board meeting tomorrowsies.
jokes.punchline: Adding cutesy suffix to 'tomorrow'
jokes.explanation: Typical Dean linguistic quirk, nothing exceptional

jokes.text: I regret giving you that unasked for adult back rub when you were asleep that once.
jokes.punchline: Extremely inappropriate confession
jokes.explanation: Deeply disturbing revelation delivered casually

jokes.text: I regret giving you that unasked for adult back rub when you were asleep that once.
jokes.punchline: Extremely inappropriate past behavior
jokes.explanation: Deeply inappropriate Dean behavior revealed casually

jokes.text: Oh, my God, it's me.
jokes.punchline: Dean's shock at seeing himself
jokes.explanation: Dean's existential shock at doppelganger

jokes.text: Oh, my God, it's me. Ugh! I will...
jokes.setup: Dean seeing Chang dressed as Dean
jokes.punchline: Horror at seeing himself replaced, cutting off mid-threat
jokes.explanation: Good visual gag setup with Dean's vanity being threatened by replacement

jokes.text: And a lizard... Your Majesty.
jokes.punchline: Formal address to school board about pet lizard
jokes.explanation: Jeff's formal acknowledgment of the lizard to authority figures

jokes.text: I never forget a face or a favorite cookie. And I brought extras, because I know how Richie got into that last basket I brought.
jokes.punchline: Casual reference to board member's cookie theft
jokes.explanation: Chang's manipulative charm with specific personal details

jokes.text: Or are you guys going to trash this building too?
jokes.setup: Chang asking how the hearing is going
jokes.punchline: Implying the group might riot at their own hearing
jokes.explanation: Chang baiting them while appearing helpful

jokes.text: He was living in the school's air vent system with a monkey!
jokes.setup: Jeff trying to expose Chang's insanity
jokes.punchline: Specific absurd living situation
jokes.explanation: Callback to Chang's bizarre living situation

jokes.text: Hey, guys. Can't stay, gotta run, but, uh, these troublemakers have got to go.
jokes.punchline: Obviously fake Dean quickly condemning group
jokes.explanation: Chang's obvious fake Dean plant working perfectly

jokes.text: I was gonna be the first one in my family to graduate from community college. Everyone else graduated from normal college.
jokes.punchline: Community college as family disappointment
jokes.explanation: Perfect Pierce moment - making community college sound like an achievement relative to his successful family

jokes.text: I was gonna be the first one in my family to graduate from community college. Everyone else graduated from normal college. Now they're really gonna give me a hard time.
jokes.punchline: Community college would have been his family's lowest achievement
jokes.explanation: Perfect Pierce moment - revealing his privilege while seeking sympathy

jokes.text: Yeah, well, my life can't get double ruined.
jokes.punchline: Britta's logic about already being at rock bottom
jokes.explanation: Good Britta logic about her already terrible situation

jokes.text: I'm also the worst. Not gonna argue, but I am gonna forgive you.
jokes.punchline: Shirley's Christian response to self-deprecation
jokes.explanation: Perfect Shirley response - agreeing but making it about forgiveness

jokes.text: what if it's the darkest?
jokes.punchline: Reference to alternate timeline concepts
jokes.explanation: Meta reference to show's own alternate timeline concept

jokes.text: That makes this the perfect timeline.
jokes.punchline: Optimistic reframing using timeline concept
jokes.explanation: Sweet Troy moment using show's sci-fi concepts for emotional truth

jokes.text: Wait. There are other timelines?
jokes.punchline: Annie's confusion about show's own concepts
jokes.explanation: Meta joke about character not being aware of show's own mythology

tmdb_overview: After a classmate suddenly dies, the study group decides to host a memorial, but Jeff turns his speech into an angry anti-Greendale rant.
insight: Meta-heavy escalation drives 85 jokes in a tight, absurdist 21-minute package.
